description: You are a DevOps engineer maintaining an incident response runbook in TiddlyWiki. Six procedure tiddlers (Post-Incident Review, Incident Detection and Alerting, Containment and Mitigation, Communication and Escalation, Recovery and Restoration, and Initial Triage and Assessment) are tagged 'IncidentResponse' but lack a defined sequence. Create a tag tiddler titled 'IncidentResponse' to order these procedures using the 'list' field in double-bracket format. The required sequence is: Incident Detection and Alerting, Initial Triage and Assessment, Communication and Escalation, Containment and Mitigation, Recovery and Restoration, and Post-Incident Review. The 'IncidentResponse' tiddler must be tagged 'Runbook' and include a body containing a brief overview paragraph (at least 20 words) describing the runbook followed by the <<list-links>> macro.
